prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DLT-STOCKING-DCCOMICS-WONDERWOMAN Product Type: HOME_FURNITURE_AND_DECOR Brand (from catalog): Ruz Existing Title: Ruz DC Comics Wonder Woman Kids Felt Holiday Stocking Home Decor Description: Get your child into the holiday spirit with the DC Comics Wonder Woman Christmas Stocking.

This cute felt stocking is embossed with a seasonal snowflake print and features famous super hero Wonder Woman. It's constructed of soft but durable felt that will last for years to come and comes with a hang loop that can easily be attached to any mantle.

The stocking itself is very lightweight and measures 15.5" in length, so you can stuff it to the brim with toys, games, and accessories before Santa arrives and it will hang safely overnight. It has a seasonal embossed snowflake pattern that will brighten up any living room or den. If your child is a Super Hero fanatic, then this Christmas stocking is the perfect home decor accessory this holiday season. Search Terms: disney kids holiday stocking stuffers boys girls christmas stockings holiday xmas socks kid themed felt colorful for sock large lightweight presents for grandkids Features: - OFFICIALLY LICENSED - Authentic Themed Kids Christmas Stocking - LARGE SIZE - Stocking Measures 15.5" in Length, Boot is 9" Wide | Stuff to the Brim with Toys, Games, Candy, Accessories and More - SOFT MATERIAL - Made of Felt with Embossed Snowflake Pattern | Perfect Home Decor Addition this Holiday Season - HANG LOOP - Sturdy Hang Loop Easily Attaches to Any Mantle | Lasts for Many Years to Come - LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - Stocking Itself Weighs Just .08 Pounds (1.28 Ounces) | Fill With Gifts and Goodies and Hang Overnight === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
